/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/SteveModMaker.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/SteveModMaker.dir/Base64.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SteveModMaker.dir/BNTX.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SteveModMaker.dir/ImageUtils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SteveModMaker.dir/Main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SteveModMaker.dir/MinecraftSkinUtil.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SteveModMaker.dir/Nutexb.cpp.o -o SteveModMaker   -L/usr/local/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib /usr/lib/libopencv_highgui.so.4.13.0 /usr/lib/libcurl.so -ltegra_swizzle /usr/lib/libopencv_videoio.so.4.13.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_imgcodecs.so.4.13.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_imgproc.so.4.13.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_core.so.4.13.0
